faq.a1: Yes. The trial class is completely free and there is no obligation to continue.
faq.q2: Do students need to prepare anything?
faq.a2: No preparation is needed. Just join the class and participate.
faq.a3: If you enjoy the class, you can join a weekly class group with other students at the same level.

landing.title: Gecko Level Check
landing.subtitle: Take a 20-question placement test to find your G.E.C.K.O level and the right Gecko class for you.
landing.signInPrompt: You'll need to sign in or create an account to start.

whatToExpect.step1: 20 questions — multiple choice, vocabulary, sentence ordering, and a short writing prompt
whatToExpect.step2: Results saved to your account — your recommended Gecko level
whatToExpect.step3: Recommendation for a trial class or joining a Gecko class

result.title: Your Gecko Level

pricingStudents.heroSubtitle: Live English classes with native-level teachers, weekend-friendly schedules, and a platform built for real progress.
pricingStudents.addOnsSubtitle: Optional extras to deepen your learning. (Not yet available for purchase — coming with Stripe.)

faq.q1: What does the schedule look like?
faq.a1: Classes are scheduled on weekday evenings and weekends so they work around school and work. We offer weekend-friendly options so you can learn without missing other commitments.
faq.q2: How does the free trial work?
faq.a2: Start with a short free trial to meet your teacher and try the platform. No payment is required upfront. If you like it, you can choose a plan and continue.
faq.q3: Can I cancel or change plans?
faq.a3: Yes. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan at any time. We'll prorate or refund as needed so you're never overcharged.
faq.q4: How do you place me in the right level?
faq.a4: We use a short placement process (and sometimes a quick conversation with a teacher) to put you in a group that matches your level and goals.

finalCta.headline: Start learning with Gecko Academy
finalCta.subline: Join a small group, get live feedback, and use the platform on your schedule.

pricingSchools.heroSubtitle: Native English teachers and a full platform for your school. Scale from platform-only to a full program partnership.
pricingSchools.heroSecondary: For students? View Gecko Academy pricing

faq.q1: Do you provide native English teachers?
faq.a1: Yes. GeckoTeach includes optional native English teachers who work with your students on our platform. You get both the platform and teaching support — curriculum, classes, and tracking in one place.
faq.q2: How do I get a custom quote?
faq.a2: Book a demo and we'll walk you through the platform, discuss your student count and goals, and provide a tailored quote. Pricing depends on seats and whether you add Gecko teachers.
faq.q3: Can we use only the platform with our own teachers?
faq.a3: Yes. The Platform Only tier gives you the full GeckoTeach platform — placement tests, classroom management, teacher dashboard, recordings, and analytics — for your own teachers to use.
faq.a4: Full Program Partner plans include teacher training and academic reporting. Platform + Teachers and Platform Only can add training as an optional service. Ask during your demo.

finalCta.headline: Ready to bring Gecko to your school?
finalCta.subline: Book a demo to see the platform and get a custom quote for your students.
